transcript.text:
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[About 10 meters long!]
[Is this cheese or rice cake?]
[Ocean-view fishcake soup]
[Will she be able to get through this mukbang?]
Today's weather is really nice~!
Check it out
[A clear day in Ulleungdo]
I'm on my way to get something to eat
I want to introduce everyone to something before I do that
It's a "plogging" campaign designed to protect the environment [Jogging+Picking up trash]
It's a collaboration with Korea Central Volunteer Center, SK Innovation, and Community Chest of Korea
Let's pick up trash first before the mukbang
-What are you doing -Picking up trash
Oh I see
Picking up trash?

You're doing great things
You have to separate these bottle caps
You'll see why in a bit
Excuse me? Anybody here?
Hello
Did you eat?
I'll eat after I pick up some trash
Can I come by later today to eat?
I'll prepare some squid for you
-Come on by later -Thank you
Hello~
[Ulleungdo stray]
[Yellowtail shop that she visited before]
Here, take some
Oh, this is a trash bag
[Gives kimchi] -Thank you

[Now go eat!]
The plastic bottle caps that were picked up
These are used as "upcycling pots" for plants, so please look into social enterprise on how to participate
Today's gotta be the clearest day it's been here
Can you see this?
The blues are so beautiful
It's before noon right now I'm going to prepare the ingredients for lunch
One of my favorite dishes: Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)
Today's view is breathtaking
You can see Dokdo Island
I bought some rice cake this morning
They're so soft
[Huge string of rice cake]
[How long is this?]
I actually had some earlier I couldn't resist
It was so good

[It's good by itself]
Half an onion
Cut this in 3's
[Ingredients for the soup]
Fish cake skewers
Only about 10 since I have a lot of rice cake?
Let's make more to share with the staff and the villagers
I'm pretty good at this
Let's make rice cake skewers for the soup
I'm smart, right?
How did I think of this? Am I a genius?
I've never done this one before
I have to get the broth going first
Hold on
That much?
Let's get started

[Some soy sauce]
A lot of black peppers
And now for tteokboki
This is the tteokboki sauce that Landrover Tteokboki owner sent me [Upload from 2021.04.21]
It's going to be so tasty
Wow, it feels like I've opened up a tteokboki stand
Wait, I do own a tteokboki shop
i've always wanted to try this
[Neighbors came by to watch]
That's respect!
I'm not even surprised anymore
-Here, drink this -Thank you!
-And give me some of that later too -Of course!
That's so long
[I've never seen such tteokboki before]
[Complete]

[Mouthwatering-redness]
Hello Gom-soon!
I can't give you any today because it's spicy!
I'll give you treats later!
It's ready now
This is a little over 10 meters long
I've never had anything like this before
Let's try some soup
Just like the fishcake soup stands
Really not bad
This is pretty spicy though
So let's pour today's drink
Looks good
Bon appetit
Fresh rice cake
Fresh rice cake with the secret sauce

It's insane
It's very chewy because it's so fresh
It's pretty spicy though, so I'm a bit worried
Still delicious
So good
The rice cake
With lots of sauce
[It's so long]
I wonder how long it will stretch
Get it like this
[Rice cake pull]
Where are you going, Gom-soon?
[Don't call me without treats]
So spicy
The sauce is really tasty, but it's spicy...
I couldn't eat too much of it last time because of the spiciness

Let's get some fish cake My tongue is in pain
Get the skewer
You can see Dokdo over there!
That's the distance from Seoul to Cheonan
You can see it So cool
Let's share some
Sir, have some Tteokboki
Thank you
Thanks for the meal
[Death]
That's not good
[His eyes are fixed on the food]
[Not my clothes] This is well-made
This is perfect for a drink
Should we get some soju? It's perfect for it
[Put away the jacket in the laundry]

Let's cut them up to make a skewer
1, 2, 3, 4
Skewer
It tastes the same but feels different
This is no joke
Would the soup neutralize the spiciness?
Let's wash it a little
About that much? The sauce is soaked up
So good
Tteokboki 3,000 Won per line
[How about mine?]
Want some treats, Gom-soon?
Hand
Good girl
Sit
She sat down!

Gom-soon is the best
I was supposed to put the rice cake skewer, I forgot
It's like the ones out in the market
It's probably because I put a lot of black peppers
Cut up the rice cake
Get that,
[And fish cake]
With the sauce
The best
Get the rice cake and fish cake with the chopsticks
It's cold
Now it's warm
Is this rice cake any different?
Amazing
Let's get some sauce on it
This feels like cheese!

The rice cake itself is so delicious
[You should've been more careful]
[It's my fault]
PD: Today's sponsor Put it over there
Right now?
We should drink this together He was looking for a drink
What's this?
Brass shot glasses
What is this?
Brass beer glasses
What is this?!
Brass glasses that keeps the drinks cold
Let's drink some
Which do you prefer?
Beer
This is the glass for it, right?

This is such a nice cup
Brass glass?
[Promoting the product] [Is he the owner?!]
You're good at it
It's going to taste so good because of the glass
You don't need to say all of that haha
Thank you
[First shot is one-shot]
[Some tteokboki after]
Looks tasty
Especially with a view like this
Very tasty
Advertisement over
[Visitors chit-chatting]
You eat so much, but you don't gain weight
[I hear that a lot]

I should share some
Here you go
[Sharing is caring!]
-Is the sauce good? -[Nods]
I shared some with the neighbors
[Cutting it all up into bite-sizes]
Selling it like this would be a success
1 big line of it for like 2,000 Won and serve it in pieces
Spicy!
This is going to take a long time because of the spiciness
Let's wash the sauce I feel like a kid again, I've done this when I was like 8
Not even 8, maybe 7 years old
Always used to wash the sauce
Much better
[More treats?]
Are you back?

Me or treats?
So pretty
Can't help but to give her treats
It would've been so nice if I had octopus or squid to put in here
I want some tempura too
Squid tempura!
Want to make some to share with the staff?
Let's end the mukbang here
[The staff team is hungry]
We have a lot left, but
I feel like I always eat well while my team works hard
We'll end today's mukbang here
And eat this with the crew after
Let's do a shot of soju to end it
Last bite!
Come eat!

[Back at the salon]
The lights are on
Anybody home?
I bought some snacks
Come on in
[Let's eat some bread together]
Do you guys want some squid?
I'll give you some
-Hang out with me today -Really?
Sure, stay for a bit
That looks so good!
You guys are like my kids
Hello
[Guest house owner]
How's Ulleung Island?
I love it here

Nature is the best
It's so beautiful
Eat while it's warm
Thank you!
[Have some]
You should cut a little over here
Maybe just the bottom
They're looking for you
[See you next time]
How much is it to cut hair?
I'll do it for free
No, it's okay!
No, it's fine
[Just sit down]
This much?
Wow, it's really straight

I've been doing this for 60 years
Go ahead and do a shake
[The world is spinning]
It's perfect!
Come sit down
PD: Me...?
We'll head out now
We have to go eat
[Trying to pay, but she won't accept it]
Buy food with it
[Please accept it]
[Already like a grandmother-grandchild]
Thank you
Come again
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Geumnarae Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
